Block.Para: An Act to amend the Bankruptcy and Insolvency Act (termination and severance pay)

Also available on the Parliament of Canada Web Site at the following address:
http://www.parl.gc.ca

This enactment amends the Bankruptcy and Insolvency Act to ensure that the claim of a clerk, servant, travelling salesperson, labourer or worker who is owed termination and severance pay by a person is included in the scheme of distribution established under section 136 of the Act.

Bill_Part.RunningHead_E: Bankruptcy and Insolvency (termination and severance pay)

Block.Para: An Act to amend the Bankruptcy and Insolvency Act (termination and severance pay)
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:
1. The Bankruptcy and Insolvency Act is amended by adding the following after paragraph 136(1)(d):

Para.change: (d.001) an amount equal to any termination or severance pay owed to a clerk, servant, travelling salesperson, labourer or worker by a bankrupt, less any amount previously paid by the trustee for that termination or severance pay;

Block.Para:
Published under authority of the Speaker of the House of Commons
